prompts.title: AI Prompts
prompts.description: Here you'll find some ready-to-use prompts for your everyday work

chatgpt-hairstyle.title: Hairstyle Analysis
chatgpt-hairstyle.description: Upload a photo of yourself, paste this prompt and let it analyze hairstyles and find the best combinations for your portrait.
chatgpt-hairstyle.text: Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.

chatgpt-color-analysis.title: Personal Color Analysis
chatgpt-color-analysis.description: Upload a photo of yourself, paste this prompt and let it analyze colors and find the best combinations for your portrait.
chatgpt-color-analysis.text: Using this portrait, create a personal color analysis with a diagram first. Show which clothing colors suit the subject well through visual comparison. Keep the text minimal and avoid paragraphs.

chatgpt-action-figure.title: Action Figure
chatgpt-action-figure.description: Transform yourself into a custom action figure. Get a professional toy design with personalized details.
chatgpt-action-figure.text: Draw an action figure of this person in the photo, the toy should be full figure wearing the same clothes, on the top of the box saying [YOUR NAME]. The accessories of the figure next to it: [ACCESSORIES THAT YOU WANT]. This figure should look like a premium toy and everything should be inside the plastic.

chatgpt-isometric-studio.title: Isometric Music Studio
chatgpt-isometric-studio.description: Create a dreamy isometric illustration of your personal music studio inside a synthesizer.
chatgpt-isometric-studio.text:
Minimalist isometric 3D illustration of a cozy, happy dreamy music studio inside a synthesizer. The exterior features classic details and futuristic elements, all rendered in earthy tones with vibrant, beautiful colors.

Inside the synthesizer, a young person like the photo that I send you, sits drawing on a tablet.

Next to him is a vintage shelf with [ITEMS THAT YOU WANT], adds a brightening effect to what is nearby. The entire scene is rendered in a warm style with shadows. And dramatic lighting, subtle perspective and cozy vibes - perfect for fans of digital art and futuristic, with a light 3D touch and a slightly plasticized feel to everything the entire scene should resemble a diorama.
